mapper.select: SELECT c.contract_id, c.contract_no, c.contract_status, c.contract_type, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.rent_price, c.deposit, c.rent_months, c.payment_cycle, c.sign_time, c.tenant_id, c.tenant_name, c.house_id, c.project_id, p.project_name, b.building_name, u.unit_name, h.house_no FROM hz_contract c LEFT JOIN hz_project p ON c.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN hz_house h ON c.house_id = h.house_id LEFT JOIN hz_building b ON h.building_id = b.building_id LEFT JOIN hz_unit u ON h.unit_id = u.unit_id WHERE c.tenant_id = #{userId} AND c.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.*, p.project_name, h.building_id, b.building_name, h.unit_id, u.unit_name, h.house_no, h.floor, h.house_type_name, h.area, h.orientation, h.decoration, h.facilities FROM hz_contract c LEFT JOIN hz_project p ON c.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN hz_house h ON c.house_id = h.house_id LEFT JOIN hz_building b ON h.building_id = b.building_id LEFT JOIN hz_unit u ON h.unit_id = u.unit_id WHERE c.contract_id = #{contractId} AND c.del_flag = '0'
